rerun0.23.0-alpha.1+dev

Module lerobot

  • Structs
  • Enums
  • Functions

In rerun::external::re_data_loader

Module rerun::external::re_data_loader::lerobot

source ·
Expand description

A module for loading and working with LeRobot datasets.

This module provides functionality to identify and parse LeRobot datasets, which consist of metadata and episode data stored in a structured format.

§Important

Currently this only supports v2 LeRobot datasets!

See LeRobotDataset for more information on the dataset format.

Structs§

  • EpisodeIndex
    Newtype wrapper for episode indices.
  • Feature
    Feature definition for a LeRobot dataset.
  • LeRobotDataset
    A LeRobot dataset consists of structured metadata and recorded episode data stored in Parquet files.
  • LeRobotDatasetEpisode
    An episode in a LeRobot dataset.
  • LeRobotDatasetInfo
    LeRobot dataset metadata.
  • LeRobotDatasetMetadata
    Metadata for a LeRobot dataset.
  • LeRobotDatasetTask
    A task in a LeRobot dataset.
  • NamesList
    A wrapper struct that deserializes flat or nested lists of strings into a single flattened Vec of names for easy indexing.
  • TaskIndex
    Newtype wrapper for task indices.

Enums§

  • DType
    Data types supported for features in a LeRobot dataset.
  • LeRobotError
    Errors that might happen when loading data through a crate::loader_lerobot::LeRobotDatasetLoader.
  • Names
    Name metadata for a feature in the LeRobot dataset.

Functions§

  • is_lerobot_dataset
    Check whether the provided path contains a Le Robot dataset.
